cms.label: Home Page
cms.description: Edit personal homepage (Hero Section, Logo, social links, etc.)

shop.label: SHOP Page
shop.description: Manage catalog items, stock, and publish status

orders.label: Orders
orders.description: Review buyer orders and advance fulfillment status

comments.label: Comment Moderation
comments.description: Review blog comments before they appear publicly

media.label: Media Library
media.description: Browse uploaded assets and reuse them across backgrounds, blog, and shop editors

payouts.label: Payout Settings
payouts.description: Connect a Stripe payout account and review whether this seller can charge and receive payouts

layout.title: Page Layout
layout.description: Manage background and display-layer settings for the current page.

content.title: Content Editing
content.description: Manage list, detail, and form content in one place.

background.description: Adjust the current page background image and background color.

list.description: Review existing content and open detailed editing.

editor.description: Edit the primary content fields and presentation assets.

create.description: Create new content and set its initial presentation.

payouts.title: Seller payout settings
payouts.subtitle: Connect an independent payout account for this seller. After buyers pay, Stripe will settle funds to this connected account and then send payouts to the linked bank account.
payouts.emptyState: No Stripe payout account has been created yet. Start onboarding and Stripe will guide this seller through profile, payment capability, and bank-account setup.

fields.bankUnavailable: No bank summary is available yet. Confirm the linked bank account inside the Stripe Express Dashboard.

hints.active: This seller account can already charge and receive payouts. You can still open the Stripe Express Dashboard to review payout timing, submit more information, or update bank details.
hints.pending: This seller account is not fully enabled yet. Continue Stripe onboarding, then sync again after returning to confirm whether capabilities are live.

messages.returned: Returned from Stripe and refreshed the latest account status.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load the payout account. Please try again later.

login.title: Login
login.description: After logging in, you can edit your personal page content.
login.error: Login failed, please try again later

cms.title: Page Editor
cms.instruction: Note: After editing the configuration, click "Save Draft" to save to draft, and click "Publish" to display on the public page.

publishConfirm.title: Confirm Publish
publishConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to publish this page? It will be visible to all visitors.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this? This action cannot be undone.

editorNav.title: Editor Navigation
editorNav.description: Jump by page structure to reduce back-and-forth scrolling.

page.title: Page Setup
page.description: Manage the homepage structure, background, and theme color in one place.

content.title: Content Modules
content.description: Edit video, image navigation, and news articles in one flow.

hero.description: Manage the hero slides, headings, menu, and social links.

background.description: Adjust the homepage background image and background color.

theme.description: Tune the primary accent color used by buttons, links, and highlights.

video.description: Manage the video section layout and item order.

news.description: Manage the homepage image navigation layout and entries.

articles.description: Edit the news article list and the news page background.

themeSettings.title: Theme Settings
themeSettings.description: Set your brand color for buttons, links, and highlighted UI states.
themeSettings.themeColorHelp: Use your brand or support color when possible.

common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this article?

blog.title: Public Blog Entry
blog.description: This page aggregates all published blog posts. Browse public posts first, then jump into each creator's blog page.
blog.emptyDescription: There are no published blog posts right now. Published posts will appear here automatically.

shop.title: Public Shop Entry
shop.description: This page aggregates all published products. Browse the public catalog first, then jump into each creator's shop and product detail pages.
shop.emptyDescription: There are no published products right now. Published products will appear here automatically.

logo.title: Logo (Top Left)
logo.url: Logo Image URL (leave empty to show text "ano")

socialLinks.title: Social Links (Top Right)
socialLinks.name: Name
socialLinks.icon: Icon (optional: select icon, enter text like "X", "YT", emoji like 🐦, or image URL)
socialLinks.empty: No social links yet. Click "Add New" above to add

titleSubtitle.titleHelp: Title displayed at the top of the Hero section
titleSubtitle.title: Title
titleSubtitle.subtitle: Subtitle

layout.title: Layout Settings
layout.backgroundColorHelp: Select the background color for the Hero section

image.title: Image
image.noImages: No images yet. Click "Add Image" to start

video.title: Video
video.noVideos: No videos yet. Click "Add Video" to add

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm Delete
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this video? This action cannot be undone.

mediaLibrary.title: Media Library
mediaLibrary.description: Reuse images you've already uploaded, or upload new assets here.
mediaLibrary.pageDescription: Browse uploaded images in one place and reuse them across backgrounds, blog covers, and product images.
mediaLibrary.replaceDescription: Choose a new image to replace every current reference to this asset.
mediaLibrary.replaceSameAsset: Choose a different asset to replace with
mediaLibrary.deleteSelectionWarning: Some selected assets are still in use. They cannot be deleted in bulk, but tags can still be updated.
mediaLibrary.deleteConfirmSingle: Delete this asset? If it is still referenced, images on public pages will break.
mediaLibrary.deleteConfirmBulk: Delete the selected {count} assets? If they are still referenced, images on public pages will break.
mediaLibrary.empty: No assets yet. Upload your first image.

newsBackground.uploadSuccess: News page background image uploaded successfully

form.title: Title *

form.published: Published (check to display article on public page)

deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this blog post? This action cannot be undone.
